calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of 3 Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Petitioners: Leila Rodriguez and Ismael Suleiman Afonso, are present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the Minors: Tamara Mustafa Suleiman, Lina Mustafa Suleiman and Dana Mustafa Suleiman, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Tamara Suleiman Afonso, Lina Suleiman Afonso and Dana Suleiman Afonso.
Decree signed in open court.
